title: Video_Wall tile-grid geometry (camera+cellfill done, layout is the blocker)
goal: Video_Wall camera + cell-fill DECODED + VERIFIED (see WIP diffs). Net +0.02 dB (10.16->10.18) - blocker is NOT the sizeWidth pitch model (empirically REFUTED: all three pitch/(n-1|n|n+1) formulas give the same world aspect 3.42, doesn't match GT's screen aspect 1.68 regardless of denominator). REAL BLOCKER (new decode, T-qd1814800): (A) Standalone 'Transition A' (world y=-2390) and 'Transition B' (world y=+3596) Image scenenodes -- Object.Type=1/2 drop-zone cards -- are rendered through the framing camera as GIANT solitary tiles filling ~40% of mid-frame (visually confirmed rendering engine f11 with WIP diffs). GT does NOT show these; FCP culls/suppresses them when they're consumed as replicator cell sources. (B) The 13 scattered Pin-2-copy replicators (Rows=1, sizeW=8200-8260 lines) contribute the ~4 vertical rows GT shows -- their Y-positions need verifying against GT frame. CONCRETE FIRST STEP: apply the 4 WIP diffs (all restored to docs/notes/wip/), then implement lead L1: in engine/src/compositor/index.ts around line 498, skip standalone rendering of image layers whose source.type in {transitionA,transitionB} when rctx.framed AND scene has a replicator-wall layer. Add a no-hardcode detector 'hasReplicatorWallWithDropZoneRefs' that fires on >=2 built-ins. Verify: f11 loses the giant blue tile artefact -> mid frames f14-f17 should recover to pre-fix ~10 dB and combined with endpoint gains push Video_Wall to >=12 dB. MEASURE SERIAL (FCT_JOBS=1). DoD: Video_Wall >=13 dB, gate 0 regressions, no fitted constants.
notes: 2026-07-16 T-qd1814800 WIP: gate green 0/0, engine byte-identical to main. WIP diffs restored to docs/notes/wip/ (previous Smear commit 86b8489 accidentally deleted them). Manifest updated with perspective-ratio analysis + Transition-A/B standalone-render root cause hypothesis. Full decode in manifest -> decode_2026_07_16_T-qd1814800_transitionAB_and_perspective.
